1735030.name: Duck and the Land of Flightless Birds
1735030.description:
Fly into Duck and the Land of Flightless Birds, a charming 2D platforming adventure. Jump, shoot, and flutter your way through zany, handcrafted worlds bursting with personality. Every fall teaches a lesson, every challenge sharpens your skills, and every victory is earned. Tight, fluid movement ensures the game is easy to pick up, but rewarding to master.

Combat is fast, responsive, and a little chaotic. Unlock and upgrade a variety of weapons through a unique leveling system that encourages experimentation and mastery. As you explore and fight, your arsenal grows alongside your abilities, giving you new ways to tackle enemies and overcome increasingly unwieldy challenges.

You are Duck.
Duck is a cute round duck.
Duck is a plump duck that cannot fly.

Flutter your way through danger as you grow stronger and more capable. Iterative progression lets you enhance your movement, combat, and survivability, transforming you from a helpless fletching into a soaring hero.Face off against a colorful cast of cunning enemies and memorable bosses that will test your reflexes and adaptability. From twitchy combat gauntlets to methodical takedowns, every fight pushes you to learn, adapt, and come back stronger.

Features

  • Tight platforming with a fluid movement system

  • Twitchy combat with a unique leveling and weapon system

  • A world overflowing with personality and humor

  • Iterative progression across movement and combat abilities

  • Crisp, stylish visuals

  • A lighthearted story with a strong comedic streak

  • Secrets and rewards for ADVANCED GAMERS

  • A Banging Soundtrack™

  • One Cool Duck
